title: candarum roxburghii
intro: Candarum roxburghii, also known as Roxburgh's Candarum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Berberidaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is known to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Candarum roxburghii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
